CreateVpc.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string not exceeding 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性).
CreateVpc.name: VPC name. The value "default" is not allowed. Up to 65 characters, consisting of letters, digits, and underscores.
CreateVpc.enableIpv6: Whether to enable IPv6 CIDR. Set to true to enable; defaults to false.
CreateVpc.tags: List of tag key-value pairs to be created.
CreateVpc.tags.tagKey: Tag key. Supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /. Length: 1–65.
CreateVpc.tags.tagValue: Tag value. Supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /. Length: 0–65.
